programme.title: The Deadly Companions
programme.desc: When a former Army officer accidentally kills a woman's young son, he offers to escort the grieving mother through dangerous Indian territory on the way to lay the boy to rest at the family homestead.

programme.title: Wild West Chronicles
programme.desc: Wild West Chronicles - The Discoveries of George McJunkin: After a devastating storm, ranch foreman George McJunkin finds ancient bison fossils and flint points unearthed in a riverbank, and he sets out to find someone in the scientific community who will acknowledge the importance of his discovery.

programme.title: Wild West Chronicles
programme.desc: Wild West Chronicles - Calamity Jane Saves the Day: Throughout Deadwood, Calamity Jane is known as a hot-tempered drunk. But when a deadly smallpox outbreak spreads through town, Calamity Jane works tirelessly to save the lives of the infected citizens who once treated her with such contempt.

programme.title: Into The Wild Frontier
programme.desc: Into The Wild Frontier - Joe Meek: Cunning Captive: A teenaged Joe Meek arrives on the frontier as a greenhorn, but he quickly masters the skills of mountain man life. Just as his trapping career is taking off, he faces a life-or-death challenge when he's taken captive by warriors from the Crow tribe.

programme.title: Handcrafted America
programme.desc: Handcrafted America - Torches, Stained Glass, Wind Chimes: Host Jill Wagner travels the country on a quest to find talented craftsmen who still make incredible items by hand. Jill starts in Hilo, Hawaii where she meets Leilehua Yuen, a metal torch maker. Leilehua shows Jill the techniques she learned from her father that she continues to use today. In Denver, Colorado, Jill meets Phil Watkins, a traditional stained glass creator that is carrying on a centuries old family artistry. Finally, in Austin, Texas, she visits Davis and Franz Blanchard, a father and son team who create a special wind chime for Jill with a decidedly Texas melody.

programme.title: State Plate
programme.desc: State Plate - Rhode Island: This state is small, but it's big on taste. Travel with Taylor to the tiniest state in the Union, Rhode Island, where he explores the historic snacks that set the state apart. In this episode, discover why it's called the Ocean State by touring Rhode Island's largest calamari festival. Next, learn what puts the “stuff” in stuffie, as Taylor helps create this iconic recipe for the plate's main course. Then, find out about the oldest food in the United States: the johnnycake. And finally, double down on dessert as Taylor dives into not one, but two, unique Rhode Island sweets.

programme.title: Cowboy Way
programme.desc: The Cowboy Way - Generations to Come: Booger and Bubba struggle to keep up with ranch work while Cody is busy with his specialty cattle sale. Much to Bubba's chagrin, Booger hires their ornery old hand Billy to pick up the slack. Cody manages to pack the sale barn with potential buyers, but will they open their wallets for the high-end cattle? Bubba and Kaley turn their dining room into a playroom for their expanding family. Booger begins collecting old stories and memories from Grandma to accompany the recipes in her cowboy cookbook.

programme.title: Wagon Train
programme.desc: Wagon Train - Alias Bill Hawks: Bill Hawks rides into a prairie town looking for his old Indian friend, but soon realizes he is not welcome. He discovers that the townspeople are drilling a well on his friend's land and won't give him any information on his whereabouts.

programme.title: Turkey Posse
programme.desc: When it comes to Merriam's turkey hunting, the Black Hills of South Dakota delivers an authentic experience. Lots of public land, lots of white-tipped gobblers, and the rugged terrain you expect in a true Merriam's turkey hunt.

programme.title: Turkey Posse
programme.sub-title: Turkey Posse - "Multiple Gobblers Down in Texas! | 3 Turkeys - 7 Beards
programme.desc: Join Kelly Cooper and her husband Will on her first-ever turkey hunt, where they experience a wild morning of turkey hunting action in Texas. Then, 8-year-old Hudson Lochte sets out to bag his first spring gobbler when a minor mistake costs him. However, Hudson redeems himself when two strutters come in hot to his decoys and his missed shot is quickly forgotten.

programme.title: Turkey Posse
programme.desc: The Wisconsin youth turkey season gives youngsters a chance to get the first crack at spring gobblers. It's an excellent opportunity to go after unpressured birds and get kids hooked on turkey hunting. Lachlan Weber's shaking hands are proof.

programme.title: Turkey Posse
programme.sub-title: Turkey Posse - "The Camera Dude's First Turkey
programme.desc: Sam Moore has been behind the camera to see several gobblers meet their maker, but now it's time for him to get on the gun.

programme.title: Turkey Posse
programme.sub-title: Turkey Posse - "TURKEY HUNTING in Maine | Silent GOBBLER Sneaks In
programme.desc: The TURKEY POSSE is on a three-state turkey hunting quest in the Northeast. Josh Dahlke stops in Maine and goes after a sneaky river-bottom gobbler.

programme.title: Turkey Posse
programme.sub-title: Turkey Posse - "A Perfect Morning of Turkey Hunting
programme.desc: A textbook turkey hunt right off the roost is hard to come by. But when a flydown setup comes together it's oh so sweet.

programme.title: Turkey Posse
programme.desc: Darron McDougal is dead set on pulling a Wisconsin longbeard into bow range. After several different setups, he finally catches the attention of an aggressive gobbler and delivers a broadhead to the boiler room.

programme.title: Turkey Posse
programme.desc: Every experienced turkey hunter is familiar with the magical 10 a.m. to 2 p.m. window for calling up lonely gobblers. Despite high heat and heavy winds, the Turkey POSSE strikes a pair of midday longbeards in this episode and lets the Savage Renegauge go to work.

programme.title: Turkey Posse
programme.sub-title: Turkey Posse - "Turkey Hunting the Deep South - Highs and Lows
programme.desc: Turkey hunting in the Deep South is infamous for hard-to-hunt gobblers. The Turkey POSSE heads to Mississippi where they get schooled and can't scratch out a gobbler to save their lives. They move over to Georgia for opening day and continue to struggle, but eventually a lone gobbler caves and slips into range for the Savage Renegauge. This hunt also brings us on a flashback to much more promising turkey hunting in Minnesota, where the POSSE runs into a pile of northern longbeards.

programme.title: Turkey Posse
programme.desc: In the heart of Texas, where turkey hunting is legendary, HuntStand Turkey POSSE member Will Cooper joins forces with friends to bring down four Rio Grande gobblers in four days. From an insane double on two longbeards, to an awesome youth hunt comeback, this episode is packed with Lone Star action.

programme.title: Baby Einstein
programme.desc: Early on in babies' development, they begin to recognize primary colors such as blue, red, and yellow. And all the while, they're also processing an infinite variety of new sights and sounds. Think of the joy you'll experience as you introduce your little one to beautiful music and imagery with Baby Beethoven Symphony of Fun.

programme.title: Baby Einstein
programme.sub-title: Baby's First Sounds: Discoveries for Little Ears
programme.desc: Perhaps the sweetest sounds you'll ever hear are the babbles and coos that one day become ma-ma, da-da and I love you. Besides being music to your ears, these baby steps of language change everything as your little one discovers an exciting, powerful new way of relating to the world! Baby's First Sounds invites both of you to share these memorable moments: those precious ''firsts'' that come around once in your baby's lifetime.

programme.title: Baby Einstein
programme.desc: With the Dolittle, and other Baby programs under their belts, the tots who follow Julie Aigner-Clark's Baby Einstein series will sidle up to Baby Newton expecting a similar exploration of building blocks to brilliance, but this time there's a wrinkle or two. Animation makes its first appearance, and parents steeped in keep-it-simple culture may object to the springy "I Know My Shapes" song, a departure from classical-only video predecessors.

programme.title: Baby Einstein
programme.desc: Within a baby's first year of life, new experiences can transform what might otherwise seem to be ordinary events into exciting opportunities for imaginative play. Baby Neptune exposes little ones to the wonders of water in their world -- whether they're stomping in the rain, splashing in the bathtub, playing "catch me if you can" with the tide on the beach, or "meeting" the fascinating creatures that live in rivers, lakes and oceans.

programme.title: Baby Einstein
programme.desc: As little ones grow, their innate sense of wonder grows too, creating an occasion for celebration with each new discovery. Baby Galileo Discovering the Sky introduces them to that remarkable canopy above us: the sun and moon, fluffy clouds, shimmering stars, colorful planets and whirling galaxies.

programme.title: Baby Einstein
programme.desc: With the Dolittle, and other Baby programs under their belts, the tots who follow Julie Aigner-Clark's Baby Einstein series will sidle up to Baby Newton expecting a similar exploration of building blocks to brilliance, but this time there's a wrinkle or two. Animation makes its first appearance, and parents steeped in keep-it-simple culture may object to the springy "I Know My Shapes" song, a departure from classical-only video predecessors.

programme.title: Baby Einstein
programme.desc: Sharing the joys and traditions of the holiday season with your little one is truly one of the greatest gifts of parenthood, and Baby Santa's Music Box makes this magical time even more special! Celebrate by treating your baby and yourself to a captivating wonderland of bright lights, sparkling ornaments, sleigh bells, toys, winter scenes, jolly Santas and more -- all accompanied by beloved holiday melodies.

programme.title: Baby Einstein
programme.desc: Learn about the numbers 1,2,3,4 & 5 through rhyme, real-life footage, counting, stories, and repetition - accompanied by classical music and real world imagery.

programme.title: Baby Einstein
programme.sub-title: Baby's First Sounds: Discoveries for Little Ears
programme.desc: Perhaps the sweetest sounds you'll ever hear are the babbles and coos that one day become ma-ma, da-da and I love you. Besides being music to your ears, these baby steps of language change everything as your little one discovers an exciting, powerful new way of relating to the world! Baby's First Sounds invites both of you to share these memorable moments: those precious ''firsts'' that come around once in your baby's lifetime.

programme.title: Baby Einstein
programme.desc: Baby Mozart is an introduction to Mozart's beautiful music, which has been proven to have positive affects on people of all ages, especially babies. Images of brightly colored toys and known objects aid in the audio presentation of child-friendly arrangements and sound effects.

programme.title: Baby Einstein
programme.sub-title: Baby MacDonald: A Day On the Farm
programme.desc: As little ones' curiosity about the world blossoms, you can help sow the seeds of discovery with Baby MacDonald: A Day on the Farm. Featuring live-action images, nursery rhymes and fun-filled puppet shows, this playful, interactive program introduces little ones to the exciting sights and sounds of a real working farm.

programme.title: Go Buster
programme.desc: Join the cute and cheeky Buster, as he rides into adventures both big and small with his friends!

programme.title: A Little Rusty
programme.desc: The Cloud of Monstrox and Jestro unlocks a mysterious Forbidden Power. What kind ofhavoc will they unleash? And can Merlok 2.0 and the NEXO KNIGHTS make the new COMBO NEXO Powers work? The Knights finally make it to the Lava Lands – using their various new forms of transport, which are all strictly civilian vechicles – and they must regroup and learn to fight together again to face the new threat of Jestro, the Cloud of Monstrox, and their STONE MONSTERS (in this case, Stone Gargoyles.) But Jestro and his monsters beat back the knights and recover the STAFF OF MONSTROX – which was buried under the ceremonial chamber from Episode 210 (and is now the Lava Puker amusement park ride) – and they get away on Jestro's EVIL MOBILE, which he recovers from the HQ garage. Macy says this is exactly why she's been touring the kingdom preparing everyone for the next attack. The Knights have to get it together because now the entire kingdom is under threat…again. Robin decides he must upgrade the Knights' vehicles and make them more “fight optimized.” Ava and Merlok 2.0 must figure out how to use new NEXO Powers because regular NEXO Powers do make Stone monsters back into stone, but the Cloud simply zaps them to life again. Meanwhile, in the IRON MOUNTAINS, Jestro and the Cloud of Monstrox find the first of the Forbidden Powers: RELENTLESS RUST. They find the ROGUL STATUE holding the power and zap him to life. Now…they can rust those shiny knights to pieces! Ava and Merlok are attempting to use NEXO COMBO POWERS – with hilarious results – as they try to figure out how they might work. When Jestro attacks, he's able to halt the Fortrex by instantly rusting its tracks and wheels! Robin has his hands full trying to clean all the rust from the attack of Relentless Rust. As the Knights attempt to defend against Jestro, the Cloud is zapping statues to life. He hits a statue with a bolt of lightning as Clay is touching it. Something happens…Clay feels odd stiff as if rock is mixing with his body. Finally, Ava and Merlok 2.0 download to the Knights their new thing: a COMBO NEXO COMBO Power. It works! It can smash the animated statues to dust! They use it to defeat Jestro, but he and the Cloud get away with the Forbidden Power of Relentless Rust. Victory … sort of. Clay talks to Merlok 2.0…something has happened to him. What can they do? Merlok 2.0 is very concerned.

programme.title: The Last Hope
programme.desc: When the Ninjas' attempt to return Garmadon's ‘Helmet of Darkness' to its perch at the Celestial Clock in order to prevent the final battle between Lloyd and his father from beginning fails, a Super Weapon is created that can destroy all of Ninjago. With the Overlord and Garmadon nearing completion of the Super-Weapon, Misako tells the group she thinks there could be one last chance at preventing Lloyd's final battle with his father. She believes if they can steal the helmet off Garmadon's head and return it to it's rightful perch on the Celestial Clock, it could stop the clock before it reaches zero, thus preventing the final battle from beginning. Dressed as Warriors, the Ninja escort their ‘captive' Misako to Garmadon, and the heroes see glimpses of the Super-Weapon being built. In a thrilling escape, Misako cleverly steals Garmadon's helmet, and they race to the Celestial Clock. Lloyd has a brief encounter with his father, and hesitates striking him. When they return the helmet to its rightful perch, they're one second too late, allowing the clock to reach zero, and for it to focus a beam of concentrated light from the sky into the Super-Weapon. Nya is taken hostage, as the others fall off a cliff, barely surviving the fall. The Ninja have failed -- the final battle has begun.

programme.title: Thunderstox
programme.desc: Jestro and the Cloud of Monstrox encounters the sculptor. He helps unleash a horde of fierce garden gnomes on Knighton. What will the NEXO KNIGHTS do against this new enemy? Will their new COMBO NEXO Powers do the trick? As Jestro and the Cloud of Monstrox head off on the Evil Mobile to 'store' the Forbidden Power in a secret location, they encounter…THE SCULPTOR. His real name is ROBERTO ARNOLDI. He's a sensitive and odd artist who has been laid off by the king (the King ordered a "smashing" statue of the Queen, and the Sculptor made a statue of the Queen literally smashing monsters. He takes everything very literally.) Jestro instructs him to make a "bad" statue that he can use to attack the knights. The Sculptor sets to work. Meanwhile, the NEXO KNIGHTS are discussing the COMBO NEXO Powers, the Forbidden Powers, and what all this means. Lance, meanwhile, decides that since his talk show career is on hold, he thinks he'll install cameras in the Fortrex and do a Big Brother-like expose show on the Knights (he decides NOT to tell the others.) Merlok 2.0 and the Cloud of Monstrox (each talking to their cohorts) explain the history of the Forbidden Powers: it's a history lesson about the WIZARDS' COUNCIL, the Forbidden Powers, and how they were stopped long ago. This visual montage leads Jestro to…MOUNT THUNDERSTROX. The Cloud of Monstrox shows him the circle of ten Standing Stones where he will insert the Forbidden Powers. "What'll happen after that?” asks Jestro, curious. "Oh, I don't want to spoil the surprise," says the Cloud. They insert the first Forbidden Power, Relentless Rust, and it locks into place on its stone. They go off to battle the Knights and collect the "bad" statue the sculptor is making. But he's made a literally bad statue…it's terrible ... garden gnomes. Like an amateur art student. And…it's not even finished. ("You can't rush bad genius!") The Knights attack with their newly modified vehicles and they succeed in destroying the Evil Mobile. They then try to use a COMBO NEXO Power, but can't…it had to be perfect to work (Ava and Merlok need to work on it.) As Jestro and the Cloud retreat, Merlok again talks to Clay about turning to stone! Merlok calls in Robin…he will need him to build something to help Clay as he becomes more and more impaired.

programme.title: Return Of The Overlord
programme.desc: When Garmadon uses his new Super-Weapon to turn Jamakai Village evil, he unwittingly unsettles the balance, allowing the spirit of the Overlord to cross over and possesses his body. Lord Garmadon witnesses the Super-Weapon come to life, revealing it to be ‘Garma-Tron', a giant moving cannon. His first test subject is Nya. Meanwhile, the heroes prepare for the final battle and sneak-attack Garmadon's compound…only to find it empty. The Super-Weapon is moving towards the coastline, where the cannon's range can reach Ninjago. On the way there, the Ninja must face off with Evil Nya, turned dark from the Super-Weapon. On the coastline, Lloyd battles his father atop Garma-Tron. The battle is fierce, but Lloyd fails at stopping his father from firing Garma-Tron, turning Jamanakai Village evil. Garmadon naively celebrates, not realizing he's undone the balance, allowing the spirit of the Overlord to cross over and possess his body. And as the Overlord continues to get more powerful, a hideous metamorphosis is taking place. Lloyd must fight the Overlord, and just when it looks like good will prevail, Lloyd is injured and thrown to the ground. In the end, the villains escape through a portal to Ninjago, and our heroes are abandoned on the island with no way home. And with the Green Ninja injured, it looks like all is lost. Evil has won.

programme.title: Rotten Luck
programme.desc: Jestro and the Cloud of Monstrox unleashes the Forbidden Power Ravaging Rot on Knighton! Turning everything into green gooey rot. But Robin has an awesome new invention that could help the NEXO KNIGHTS Jestro and the Cloud of Monstrox find a second Forbidden Power near the falling down Swamp Castle: RAVAGING ROT. With this power, they can make everything in the kingdom rot – food, vegetation, anything that grows or is natural. And that's exactly what they do! It's awful and makes everything stink. The Sculptor start to sculpt a portable HeadQuarter for his master, Jestro. Jestro expects it to be done when they return from ravaging the land. Axl is very concerned – he's into organic food ... and now food starts to rot. Merlok 2.0 and Ava are continuing to work on perfecting the COMBO NEXO Powers. We see display screens of MANY of the NEXO Powers. But there's a huge power consumption issue with these new-fangled combos. “I'll have to find an algorithmic power curve consumption solution, magic man,” says Ava. “I always just sort of choose them by, uh, feel.” “What do you feel like?” “Uh, a ham sandwich, a banana, and dragon fire,” responds Merlok. “That produced a combo with 2% efficiency,” says Ava. “This is why we have to actually THINK about and study perfec Combos. We need automatic power integration.” The Knights must stop Jestro from rotting all the food and living plant matter in Knighton and Axl leads the charge. But as they finally confront Jestro, who's trying to rot a field of beans near Fruitbridge, they're hit by his finally completed ROLLING HQ (the Sculptor is proud of the “artsy” elements.) … it's not exactly perfect though … he took the idea of Head Quarter a little too litteral and created a big head. Finally, in this conclusive battle where the knights get strapped on a rotting bridge, Clay emerges in a sleek, new BATTLE SUIT that Robin built for him because he was starting to have trouble moving around (the whole turning to stone thing.) It's smaller and more high-tech than the bigger Mechs of the past. Clay's able to drive Jestro off. Jestro, at the end of the episode, puts the Forbidden Power of Ravaging Rot into Mount Thunderstrox. Meanwhile, back at the Fortrex, Axl makes an organic food feast for all his fellow Knights.

programme.title: Rise Of The Snakes
programme.desc: The four Ninja are snapped out of their post-hero complacency when Lord Garmadon's young son Lloyd shows up and tries to pick up where his father left off. The Ninja dismiss him as a threat, but regret that choice after Lloyd wakes up the evil snake tribe. A prophecy is revealed that states a green ninja will ultimately defeat Lord Garmadon.

programme.title: The Book Of Monsters, Part 1
programme.desc: When Jestro the Jester finds the Book of Monsters, chaos breaks loose in the Kingdom of Knighton. Can the newly graduated Knights from the Knights' Academy save the kingdom? It's final graduation fighting exams for the latest Knights from Knights' Academy. All our new Knights demonstrate their prowess: CLAY, AARON, AXL and LANCE. PRINCESS MACY get to join them, but her father doesn't want her to graduate. As part of the entertainment, MERLOK does an amazing magic trick. His act is followed by…JESTRO, the King's Jester. He's terrible (and he should know to never follow a better act.) Everyone laughed because he's a real joke....a total failure. While Jestro roams the halls fo the King's Castle, forlorn, he hears the BOOK OF MONSTERS calling to him from Merlok's library. The book talks Jestro into gathering as many books of spells as he can carry, but they're interrupted by...Clay! As Jestro quickly pages through the Book of Monsters to attack Clay, Merlok arrives. There's a battle in the library between Jestro and Merlok. Finally, the wizard summons up his most powerful spell in self-defence. BOOM! There's a big, magical explosion and when Clay forces his way back into the library, Merlok, Jestro and the magic books are...GONE!

programme.title: New Girl in Town
programme.desc: When the World Petacular comes to Heartlake City and is almost ruined before it's even started, five feisty girls unite, despite their differences, using their creativity to save the day. Best friends Olivia, Andrea, Emma, Mia and Stephanie reside in HeartLake City but didn't know each other - that is until the World Petacular brought them together! On the eve of the biggest event Heartlake City hosts, disaster and chaos is abound. New-in-town Olivia is helping her veterinarian Aunt Sophie with her mobile clinic. But when she's put in charge of training a scruffy puppy named Scarlet, the puppy runs amuck, leaving a trail of destruction as she collides with Andrea, ruins Emma's banner and Stephanie's cakes, and finally spooks Mia's horse Bella who bucks Mia off and sprints away. The girls quickly unite, helping each-other to save the day and most importantly have fun along the way!

programme.title: Home
programme.desc: Back in training mode with the looming threat of Lloyd and the Hypnobrai, Zane wanders after a Falcon and lands himself in a heap of trouble. The rest of the Ninja leave the training dojo to help him and return to find that the snakes have burned it to the ground.

programme.title: The Book Of Monsters, Part 2
programme.desc: Realizing they must defend the Kingdom from Jestro's monsters, the Knights try to organize but are despondent when they discover their best advisor – Merlok the Magician – has sacrificed himself to save them. When Jestro awakens, he's been blasted miles and miles away from the King's Castle by Merlok's explosive spell. And, it seems, all the books he was trying to steal have been scattered, too. The Book of Monsters broke Jestro' fall and now he can use the book to attack the people who laughed at him. Meanwhile, the King and his newly-trained Knights pick through the rubble of Merlok's library. They'll have to figure something out, because Jestro and his newly made magic monsters attack King's Castle! Clay organizes the Knights to defend the kingdom, but they've never worked together before. It takes all their training, plus the help of an old friend…MERLOK! Only now he's MERLOK 2.0. Ava has been piecing together what happened and discovering that the “ghost in the machine” she's been chasing is really Merlok in digital form. Now, he can use his magic digitally and he downloads just the right weapons to the struggling Knights! They finally foil Jestro's attack with Merlok's help and officially become NEXO KNIGHTS!

programme.title: Stephanie's Surprise Party
programme.desc: When Emma, Olivia, Andrea and Mia plan a surprise party for Stephanie's birthday, they soon discover that it's not easy keeping their plans secret from Stephanie who becomes suspicious when none of the girls have time to hang out. When Emma, Olivia, Andrea and Mia plan a surprise party for Stephanie's birthday, they discover that it's not easy keeping their plans a secret. As the girls choreograph a dance routine, magic show and search for the perfect present and cake, Stephanie becomes aware that her friends are avoiding her on her birthday and excluding her from their activities... Little does she know that her friends are secretly preparing a surprise pool party for her! Once the surprise is revealed Stephanie realises how much her friends care about her and the importance of friendship.

programme.title: Snakebit
programme.desc: Lloyd, having been kicked out of the Hynobrai snake tribe unlocks a second tribe – The Fangpyres – to help him regain control. The Ninja are busy setting up their new HQ that Zane discovered, but are called to duty when the Fangpyres attack the village where Jay's family lives.

programme.title: The Power Of Merlok
programme.desc: When Jestro attacks a village on the far side of the Kingdom, the NEXO-Knights wonder how they'll get there. Then Macy remembers her dad has a royal RV…maybe they can “mod” that for their own, “knightly” use? Now the NEXO-Knights get rolling…in THE FORTREX, their own ROLLING CASTLE! This great new HQ, which houses Merlok 2.0 as an operating system, will be how the knights move around Knighton and protect it from Jestro and his monsters. Speaking of the evil jester, in this episode Jestro uses some newly-made monsters to attack a town far from the capitol where he thinks he's safe from the Knights' reach. We see two parallel stories here: the Knights training, learning more about digital magic and getting organized as a team and at the same time we see Jestro making monsters, trying to learn how his powers work and talking to the Book. In the end, the Knights roll up in their castle and defeat Jestro and his marauding monsters. Lance thinks he should be the leader because he's a snot. “Of course I'm the leader…I'm a Richmond.”

programme.title: Dolphin Cruise
programme.desc: Olivia, Stephanie, Andrea, Mia and Emma enter a science contest at school and win a trip on a luxury yacht but not everything goes as planned when they set out to sea. When Olivia, Stephanie, Andrea, Mia and Emma enter a school science contest and win a Dolphin sight-seeing trip, not everything goes to plan...As the girls set out to sea on a luxury yacht, misunderstandings and disagreements occur which become secondary when they discover a pod of dolphins in danger. The girls learn that they have to compromise and trust in each other if they are to save the dolphins and their trip out to sea...

programme.title: Never Trust A Snake
programme.desc: After the Fangpyres join forces with the Hypnobrai, Lloyd awakens Pythor – the last remaining snake of the Anacondrai tribe. Pythor lures Lloyd under his spell and steals a map from him that will show him where the remaining two snakes tribes dwell and Uncle Sensei saves Lloyd from doom.

programme.title: The Knights Code
programme.desc: Jestro uses the Book of Chaos to unleash, um, chaos and attack the King's hover train to try and kidnap the royal party. Can the NEXO-Knights bring order out of the chaos and save the King? Jestro finds the Book of Chaos in the countryside and decides he must feed it to the book. The Book of Monsters actually tells Jestro NOT to feed it to him he tells Jestro he's not ready for that kind of power. But Jestro doesn't listen. Now the Book unleashes chaotic monsters and Jestro uses them to attack the King and his party who are on a business-related tour of the kingdom. When the NEXO-Knights show up to stop the monster attacks and realize that they must save King and Queen Halbert – Macy's parents – from the chaotic evil monsters that have been unleashed. Clay asserts himself as leader and brings order to the knights from the chaos. He has his own book: the Book of the Knight's Code. They should all live by it.

programme.title: Country Girls
programme.desc: When the girls go to Mia's grandparents' ranch and Olivia accidentally knocks down the neighbor's barn, the girls promise to raise money to rebuild it and now have to learn to set aside their differences and work together to make good on their promise. Mia invites her friends to her grandparents' ranch for the weekend. But when Olivia accidentally knocks down a neighbor's barn with a tractor, the girls promise to raise the money to rebuild it themselves. Complicating matters, Mia and Stephanie turn out to like the same boy, Martin. They'll have to learn to set aside their differences and work together if they're going to raise enough money to make good on their promise.

programme.desc: Andy's Wild Adventures Andy and Kip embark on another Wild Adventure to see Japanese Macaques in the snowy mountains of Japan.

programme.title: Andy's Wild Adventures

programme.title: Andy's Wild Adventures

programme.title: My World Kitchen
programme.desc: My World Kitchen Eddie makes a delicious cheese pizza/Ria and Rohan cook tandoori chicken/Connor makes a vegetarian haggis

programme.title: My World Kitchen

programme.title: Steps Of Faith
programme.desc: Steps of Faith is a light-heart dramedy about Faith Houston an accountant, who is directed by God to move to a small town to work on a Hippotherapy farm helping children. Faith is mocked by her family since she doesn't have a rapport with children or animals and is not a devout Christian. Faith decides to follow her heart and move after she encounters several challenges. She finds herself at the farm in the horse stalls shoveling manure. Faith cracks under pressure and leaves after a child is almost injured questioning whether she heard God's voice or not.

programme.title: Monkey King: Hero is Back
programme.desc: Out of his imprisonment, the all-powerful Monkey will need to save an innocent village from the evil Mountain Lord and his monstrous army.

programme.title: Blippi and The Holiday Snow Globe
programme.desc: Join Blippi and Meekah as they learn all about festive seasons for different people around the world! Learn about Christmas and decorate a tree with Santa, Learn about Kwanzaa with Baba The Storyteller and Hanukkah at The Westside Jewish Community Center!

programme.title: Berry Double Trouble
programme.desc: Lemon and Raspberry hire twins Sweet & Sour to help out in Strawberry's café, so Strawberry will have time to appear in an internet fashion contest they are entering.

programme.title: Berry Bitty Adventurer
programme.desc: Strawberry's world-traveling cousin Apple Dumplin' stops at Berry Bitty City. What starts as a brief visit becomes a series of comical misadventures that ends with Apple finding a new home with Strawberry and her friends.

programme.title: Foods that are Super Powerful
programme.desc: Avery makes a power-packed dinner with Chef Robert Bartley who makes meals for Toronto's top sports teams. Lily stops at the Healthy Butcher for super-charged chicken and veggie sausages. Things heat up in the kitchen for the big chilli cook-off.

programme.title: Foods that are Wrapped
programme.desc: Can a meal be wrapped like a present? Lily finds out with Chef John Klianis when they prepare Spanakotiropita. Avery makes authentic Mexican tacos at La Tortilleria. Together with Matt, they wrap things up with meals in a package, or “En Papillotte” as the French say.

programme.title: Malicious Mayhem
programme.desc: Revolver gains the upper hand in his battle with Yusaku. Yusaku manages to fight back with his Link Summons, only for Revolver to reveal a shocking Skill.

programme.title: Eye of the Storm
programme.desc: The duel between Yusaku and Revolver ends in a draw. Being pulled into the center of the Data Storm, Revolver challenges Yusaku to another duel and aims to completely destroy Yusaku's Cyberse cards.

programme.title: KidCity
programme.desc: Play along with the KidCity family —Little Flash, Ava, DadCity, and MomCity— in all their kid-friendly games!

programme.title: Onyx Family
programme.desc: Onyx Family is best known for their spooky skits, starring the Onyx Kids: Shiloh, Shasha, Sinead, and Shalom.

programme.title: Challenge Squad

programme.title: EvanTubeHD

programme.title: HobbyKidsTV
programme.desc: Come along for the fun with popular YouTube family, HobbyKidsTV! Plus, HobbyKids Adventures!

programme.title: EvanTubeHD
programme.desc: Share in the fun with YouTube star EvanTubeHD, his sister JillianTubeHD, and the whole Tube Family!

programme.title: HobbyKidsTV
programme.desc: Come along for the fun with popular YouTube family, HobbyKidsTV! Plus, HobbyKids Adventures!

programme.title: Nate is Late
programme.desc: Nate and Malika arrive to school late every morning because something amazing always happens on the way - not that the principal ever believes them.

programme.title: Abdallah Smash Lego Star Wars
programme.desc: Watch Abdallah playing Smash Lego Star Wars!

programme.title: Fishtronaut
programme.desc: The series tells the story of Fishtronaut, a fish in a spacesuit, similar to reverse scuba gear, which allows him to fly and breathe out of water.

programme.title: Ben & Hairy
programme.desc: Ben wakes up one morning to find he has a Yeti in the house and brings him to work hoping none of the guys will notice and you know, it pretty much works.

programme.title: Superman
programme.desc: The Man of Steel fights a mad scientist who is destroying Metropolis with an energy cannon.

programme.title: Fizzy's Lunch Lab
programme.desc: Professor Fizzy prepares food and teaches about nutrition, diet and physical activity.

programme.title: Satisfying Video
programme.desc: Here you will find videos of finger family nursery rhymes, Play Doh, Kinetic Sand, Toys

programme.title: Bakugan Armored Alliance: Awesome Brawlers Training Camp, Part 1
programme.desc: The Awesome Brawlers head to a training facility owned by Kasami International to prepare for the Bakugan Battle League Los Volmos. But once the gang figures out they will all be competing against each other for the same title, the team building retreat doesnt go as planned.

programme.title: Krewcraft: Opening our first restaurant in Krewcraft!
programme.desc: We create a local restaurant in Krew Town!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ARC-V!: A Con's Game
programme.desc: Zuzu goes deck-to-deck against Sergey, an ex-con who's looking to X out the competition!

programme.title: Battles: Deep Sea Fishing Battle 2
programme.desc: We caught some HUGE fish! 350lb Marlin and so many more. Plus Sparky's worst day ever?!

programme.title: Hero 108: Pitched Battle of the Air Force
programme.desc: Highroller and his minions attack Big Green, led by an enormous Black Dragon, but First Squad uses Woo's new machine to create their own dragon who manages to fend off the attack.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Bop Til You Drop / The Sleepless Sleepover
programme.desc: The Park is especially full of Kids today, but all of them are busy playing - and Bop can't find anybody to play with her. When the others see her feeling sad, they decide to play whatever she wants t

programme.title: Toca Life Stories: Toca Life Stories: Chapter Three
programme.desc: Will Nari's help be enough to pet the elusive Paper Bag Cat? Does Leon manage to escape his influencer nightmare? And WHY does Zeke bring a horse to school? Follow the gang and their quest to vanquish

programme.title: Elemon: Elemon Forever
programme.desc: With the great battle over, Mateo realizes he must set out on a journey to continue to grow as an Elemon creator. This gets Leo thinking. Perhaps there's more for him to learn about the secrets of Elemon in the wild world beyond New Olympia Polis walls.

programme.title: The Adventures of Bernie: The Giant Seaweed | The Fish Tamer | The Fan Battle
programme.desc: Bernie sees Barbara gardening, and is inspired to try and grow a plant that he can climb all the way up to the surface on, to be reunited with Zig! But the plant takes forever to grow.

programme.title: Magic Mixies: Mixlings: Volcano / Time to Relax
programme.desc: Sienna and the Mixlings decide to go to one of the most dangerous places in Mixia Volatile Volcano! Each Mixling gets to ask Divina one question about their future which hints that Sienna's magic is far more powerful than they originally thought...what will this mean for the future of the Mixlings?! / Sienna and the Mixlings head to Rainforest Retreat for some much-needed self-care...or so they thought. Can Sienna use her magic to escape the army of Mixlings entranced by chaotic magic?!

programme.title: Lucas The Spider: Boo / Never Boop a Robot
programme.desc: Lucas loves to give his friends a scare on Halloween. / When Lucas boops a robot, he and his friends are chased around House!

programme.title: Mia: The Amusement Park / The Mirror Mystery
programme.desc: Mia opens a ride in her amusement park before it is ready in order to compete with Rufus and Rango's amusement park. / One morning, Mr. Maurice discovers that his mirror has disappeared! Mia and Marty

programme.title: Todd World
programme.desc: Todd and his friends feel sorry for Vark who's missing their holiday Dirt Day, but soon discover Vark is celebrating a different and equally enjoyable holiday of his own.

programme.title: Todd World
programme.desc: The puppies look up to their super cool Uncle Benny, which makes it very hard for him to admit to them that he still loves his baby blanket, Mr. Cuddle Wuddle.

programme.title: Super Supremes: Old MacDonald Had A Farm / Exercise Song / The Supremes Finger Family / Mama May I Songs For Kids / Colors Of The Rainbow
programme.desc: Old MacDonald gets a surprise visit from the Supremes, and Noah, Gigi, Huggy and Buggy help him around the farm.

programme.title: Zenon the Farmer: Draft Horse
programme.desc: Enjoy, dance, sing and learn with Zenon the Farmer's best songs.

programme.title: Animal Show with Stinky and Jake: Sea Otter / Vulture

programme.title: The Bumble Nums: The Three Little Bumble Nums / Yawning Yam Yogurt
programme.desc: Once upon a time, Stumble, Humble, and Grumble set out on a journey to each build a kitchen of their very own. The Bumble Nums used different materials for their kitchens and were busy cooking when a big, bad visitor showed up. He threatened to huff and puff and blow their kitchens in. Can he do it? Or can the little chefs cook their way out of trouble using the secret ingredient? / Today, the Bumble Nums are going to make Yawning Yam Yogurt. But can Humble, Grumble, and Stumble get the secret ingredient from the garden without falling asleep? And will they ever get back to the kitchen in time for the Cooking Countdown? Watch and find out!

programme.title: Masha and the Bear: Bon Voyage / Trading Places Day
programme.desc: What does it take to turn a regular journey into a great trip? One Bear, one travelling bag and... One Masha. However, they are not meant to travel very far together... / The Bear recalls his past accomplishments in circus and recreates some of his signature tricks on a unicycle. Unfortunately, he trips and falls on his head. Suddenly everything about him starts to suspiciously resemble Masha and her childish behavior.

programme.title: Workin' Moms
programme.desc: Eleanor quickly takes over babysitting duties running Kate's household and Charlie's schedule her way. Now that Kate's hired her, can she actually fire her own mother? Meanwhile, in an attempt to shut down her daughter's wild nature, Anne hires a “mean nanny” who can keep Alice in line, but also threatens to keep Anne in line too. And when Jenny's husband Ian surprises her at work, Jenny's flustered reaction leads Ian to wondering… why does Jenny suddenly love work so much?

programme.title: Workin' Moms
programme.desc: Kate is faced with a veritable “Sophie's choice” when her mother Eleanor pressures Kate to put down her longtime pet Olly in favour of protecting Charlie. Meanwhile, a therapy session with Anne leads Frankie to attempt to re-invigorate her marriage, and Anne on the home front finds "Mean Nanny's" friendly rapport with Alice not only annoying, but also surprisingly enviable.

programme.title: Workin' Moms
programme.desc: When Kate is shamed – both in Mommy and Me and at work – for liking submissive animated porn, she's left wondering exactly the same thing as those she confided in: what's wrong with her? At Tech-cellent! Jenny ups her game in attracting Marvin, but is far from prepared when he takes the bait. And Frankie makes a breakthrough in her disconnection issues with Giselle thanks to an unlikely source.

programme.title: Workin' Moms
programme.desc: Kate has difficulty letting go and embracing a softer side both at work and when she entrusts her dramatic mother with nanny duties. But Kate must call upon her “mama bear” instincts, when she is forced to help Frankie out of a dangerous situation. Meanwhile, Anne tries tough love with her wild child daughter, and Jenny attempts to attract the interest of her new manager, but fails — confusing him, and sending her further down a reckless road.

programme.desc: Rob Maher proves that he has the most versatile first name in the English language, that your relationship ended because you didn't spend enough money on wrapping paper, and that being an "accident" is worse than being adopted.

programme.title: Dry Bar Comedy
programme.desc: Moody was born “Matthew” in Syracuse, NY, into a rambunctious household with six siblings. (They're Irish...somebody had to get a nickname.) He began doing comedy in 1992 and was soon hired by Syracuse's top morning radio show to cover sports and write jokes, his first loves. After six years of working the road, Moody moved to New York City. This millennium has been good to Moody: he's also been featured on Last Comic Standing, Star Search (the 2003 reboot), and America's Got Talent. He's a regular at the best clubs in the land (including the world famous Comedy Cellar) and can be heard on SiriusXM. Moody's material is described as original but universal, and smart without being trite. Couple that with a disarming stage presence & in-the-moment chops, you'll see why he's earned the admiration of his peers for his ability to “go up cold” and turn any setting into a hot room. From corporate outings to pubs, this versatile performer will brighten any event.

programme.title: Dry Bar Comedy
programme.desc: Alex Velluto is a stand-up comedian and Diet Coke drinker from Salt Lake City, Utah. He has performed at comedy festivals all over the country including the Boston Comedy Festival, Big Sky Comedy Festival, and the Seattle International Comedy Competition. He was named “Best of Fest” at the Golden Spike Comedy Festival and is the winner of the Finger Lakes Comedy Festival in Ithaca, NY. In 2016, Alex was voted “Best Comedian” by City Weekly Magazine. His debut comedy special “Alex Velluto: Spurious” is currently streaming on Amazon.com.

programme.title: Leland Klassen
programme.desc: Raised on a farm in the heart of Canada, Leland quickly learned that shoveling manure and weeding potatoes, although lucrative, wasnít his passion in life. So with absolutely no clear direction or vision for his future, he did what everyone does when they find themselves in that position - he went to University. He wisely chose his classes based on whichever cute girl happened to catch his attention and after several short years of last minute cramming and late assignments, Leland graduated from the University of Saskatchewan with a degree in Anthropology. As you might have guessed, Lelandís university education opened many doors for him in the years to come, but for some reason he was dissatisfied working for a courier as a night shift stock boy. By this time married and with his first child soon on the way, the most responsible and obvious choice was, of course, to pursue a career in the entertainment industry. Starting off at amateur nights and seedy bars Leland decided right from the beginning that he would remain clean despite what everyone else was doing and as a result over the last 16 years Leland has become recognized as Canadaís premier clean comedian. With his unique intelligence and wit, Leland has carved out quite a niche for himself in the world of entertainment. Using his farm boy charm and handsome (although somewhat inbred) Mennonite good looks, Lelandís clever observations and rich life experiences are brought to life in a one-of-a-kind show. LELANDíS CREDITS: Halifax Comedy Fest 2014, Just for Laughs in Montreal, 1999, 2001, 2004 and 2014, Host of Popcorn TV, Featured on Thou Shalt Laugh 5, Host of Comedy Tournament, Co-Host GMA Canada 2009, 2012 and 2013, Promise Keepers Canada, Episode of the US syndicated comedy series ìBananasî, Two of his own television seriesí on the West Coast, as well as Appeared on numerous other programs across the United States and Canada, such as Comedy Network, CBC Television, YTV, Star TV, Global and Discovery Kids.

programme.title: Dry Bar Comedy
programme.desc: Scotty K proves that he is a jack of all trades, or at least of two: the guitar and comedy. In this set, Scotty refers to everything from Rascal Flatts to Stretch Armstrong. If you miss the "good old days," this is sure to take you back!

programme.title: Tim Young
programme.desc: Tim headlines clubs all over North America, has performed on over 500 college campuses as well as comedy festivals in New York, Montreal, and Seattle, and he's a fixture in the New York City club scene. He was a finalist on NBCs Last Comic Standing, has appeared on Comedy Centrals Premium Blend, Tough Crowd, and Shorties, and you may have seen him as a commentator on VH1, MTV, TLC and the E! Channel.

programme.title: Tom Segura: Completely Normal
programme.desc: Tom Segura share a few off-hand appraisals on hotels and hobbies with a cool and thoughtful demeanor in this one-hour comedy special.

programme.title: Jay Mohr: Altamont
programme.desc: Straight-talking comedian Jay Mohr tackles subjects from unexpected visitors, bringing up children (and dogs) to working with Chris Farley.

programme.title: Jinkx Monsoon: Red Head Redemption
programme.desc: Jinkx Monsoon recounts some of the crazier tales from her sex-addicted, alcoholic past, which led to her finding her true self.

programme.title: Monet X Change Fist of Glory
programme.desc: Join Queen Mont X Change in her debut stand up special where she takes you on a comedic romp of dazzling stories from her life.

programme.title: Bill Hicks One Night Stand
programme.desc: Its a wild night of raucous fun as Bill Hicks shows us his unique view on smoking cigarettes, smoking pot, drinking, sex, advertising, and music.

programme.title: Kevin Hart Presents Lil Rel Howery
programme.desc: Lil Rel Howery talks about everything from his upbringing to raising his own children to getting roasted by teenagers on public transportation.

programme.title: Eddie Griffin You Can Tell 'Em I Said It
programme.desc: Eddie Griffin proves once more that hes one of the worlds premiere comedic talents in this stand-up special You Can Tell Em I Said It.

programme.title: Invasion of the Pod People
programme.desc: After a woman's closest friends and co-workers undergo extreme personality changes, she begins to suspect that they have been replaced by malevolent alien invaders.

programme.title: 666: The Child
programme.desc: After a plane crash were a boy is the only survivor, a childless couple adopts him and soon discovers he is something very powerful, something very dark. This small boy is the Beast and with him he carries the Beginning of the End.

programme.title: Atlantic Rim
programme.desc: When giant monsters crawl out of the Atlantic Ocean and attack the Eastern Seaboard, the U.S. government is forced to trust A.I. robots to defend the country.

programme.title: Attila
programme.desc: When American soldiers inadvertently steal Attila the Hun's secret wishes, the wrath of the barbarian is awakened, and the mummified warrior will stop at nothing to kill the intruders.

programme.title: Airplane VS Volcano
programme.desc: When a commercial airliner is trapped within a ring of erupting volcanoes, the passengers and crew must find a way to survive - without landing.

programme.title: A Map of the World
programme.desc: A school nurse (Sigourney Weaver) faces the scorn of her community after an accident on her property.

programme.title: Marilyn Monroe Declassified
programme.desc: Declassified FBI and CIA documents help unravel the puzzle of Marilyn Monroe's demise, which was ruled a "probable suicide," while providing evidence suggesting that Marilyn was murdered.

programme.title: Unsolved Mysteries: The Sleepwalker Killing
programme.desc: A man admits to murder, but his lawyers try to prove that he wasn't awake when it happened. With Hilary Swank.

programme.title: My Mom's New Boyfriend
programme.desc: Henry Durand (Colin Hanks) is a young FBI agent who is given a difficult assignment: spy on his mother (Meg Ryan) and her boyfriend (Antonio Banderas) who is suspected of leading a gang of art thieves.

programme.title: Checkmate
programme.desc: Six people come together during an elaborate bank heist during which any move can alter the outcome. Is it coincidence, or are they merely pawns in a much bigger game?

programme.title: Transsiberian
programme.desc: A Transsiberian train journey to Moscow becomes a thrilling chase of deception and murder.

programme.title: Post Impact
programme.desc: After a meteor strike starts a new ice age, a group of survivors try to find a device that could give mankind new hope. Featuring Dean Cain and Bettina Zimmermann.

programme.title: Bull Shark
programme.desc: A hungry shark begins feeding on unsuspecting lakegoers in a small Texas town.

programme.title: When The LAPD Blows Up Your Neighborhood
programme.desc: Tensions rise on a busy street as news organizations and local residents witness an extremely volatile situation turn into a literal powder keg. A DOC+ Original.

programme.title: Mala Onda
programme.desc: Farm animals are being killed all across Puerto Rico and no one knows what's going on. The animals are found with two circular incisions, but no blood. Experts from different backgrounds, farmers who lost animals, and eye witness's explain what they think is happening. Is the Chupacabra a symbol of destruction or a cause for unity? A DOCUMENTARY+ Original film.

programme.title: The Sentence Of Michael Thompson
programme.desc: In 1994, Michael Thompson was arrested for selling three pounds of cannabis and was sentenced to 42 to 60 years in prison. He is the longest serving non-violent offender in the history of Michigan and he is finally up for clemency. A DOCUMENTARY+ original.

programme.title: Crypto Farmers
programme.desc: Can you make money from manure? Farms are struggling to get by in this modern world. Farmers are forced to diversify their income steams in order to survive. With a remarkable new invention from a young entrepreneur farmers in rural Wales are now heating up piles of cow manure to power crypto mining rigs.

programme.title: Kid Yamaka
programme.desc: In this deeply human story, Emmy-nominated director Matt Ogens explores boxer Zachary "Kid Yamaka” Wohlman's difficult past, his training under world-class coach Freddie Roach, and his path to personal redemption through boxing, Judaism, and sobriety. With Zachary's 2021 passing, this film serves as a moving tribute to his hustle, heart and soul and to all those who struggle with addiction.

programme.title: Five Years North
programme.desc: Five Years North is the coming-of-age story of Luis, an undocumented Guatemalan boy who just arrived alone in New York City.

programme.title: Salam Neighbor
programme.desc: Two filmmakers fully embed themselves in a Syrian refugee camp, providing an intimate look at the world's most dire humanitarian crisis.

programme.title: Picture Locked: Chris Temple & Zach Ignasci
programme.desc: Picture Locked is an immersive retrospective with documentary filmmakers providing an in-depth breakdown of their breakthrough works, taking audiences shot by shot through the twists and turns of their process, while dissecting their own journeys as directors and the industry at large.

programme.title: Andy Warhol: A Life In Art
programme.desc: From early on in his career, Andy Warhol had an extraordinary ability to find the sacred in the profane. Like so many successful Americans, he was a product of Eastern European immigrant experience, who himself became an icon - a shy, gay, working-class man who became the court painter of the 1960s and 70s.

programme.title: The Way You Look Tonight
programme.desc: Ditched after a perfect date, Peter turns to an online dating site guaranteed to find his perfect match, but notices strange similarities between all his matches and that first amazing date.

programme.title: Shoot To Marry
programme.desc: Heartbroken filmmaker Steve Markle has found the perfect way to meet women: ask them to be in his documentary! Steve stumbles through interviews with dozens of intriguing women intent on finding love.

programme.title: Double Eagle Ranch
programme.desc: Marc, a deadbeat writer, manipulates his recent ex-girlfriend, Lindsay, into accompanying him to spread his late grandmother's ashes at her mountain property. Marc's attempt to win her back goes awry when they discover the cabin has accidentally been double-booked by a happier couple.

programme.title: Believe Me
programme.desc: Desperate, broke, and out of ideas, four college seniors start a fake charity to embezzle money for tuition.

programme.title: The Silencers
programme.desc: The first of the series of Secret Agent Matt Helm films, the big cheese of Big O, an organization that wants to sabatoge the American atomic missile system.

programme.title: Ship of Fools
programme.desc: Passengers on a ship traveling from Mexico to Europe in the 1930s represent society at large in that era.

programme.title: The Lady From Shanghai
programme.desc: An itinerant Irishman finds trouble after a life insurance scam leaves him accused of a murder he didn't commit.

programme.title: The Long Ships
programme.desc: Viking adventurers butt heads during a search for the golden bell of St. James.

programme.title: Foo Fighters
programme.desc: With a career of over two decades and album sales over 11 million, Foo Fighters are giants in the world of contemporary rock. The roots of the band were of a much smaller scale, though, with the early musical projects of a teenage Dave Grohl. Nirvana came to a tragic end with the death of front man, Kurt Cobain. Grohl began working with the songs he had written on tour, to produce the first Foo Fighters album. With 2 Grammys, multiple albums including a best of and a new album release in 2014 there is no stopping them. Featuring archive material, music videos – “BEST OF YOU” “MONKEY WRENCH” and, exclusive insights from music critics and journalists JOHN AIZLEWOOD (Evening Standard), DANIELLE PERRY (XFM), WILL HODGKINSON (The Times) & CAMILLA PIA (BBC Radio 6)

programme.title: Avril Lavigne
programme.desc: The Canadian Avril Lavigne enchanted the public in 2007 at her show in Calgary (Canada), in which she released the album “The Best Damn Thing”, which sold, that same year, more than 6 million copies worldwide. The pop singer rocked the audience to the sound of “Girlfriend” as well as other great hits like “Complicated” and “I'm With You”. programme.title: Fun'Q with Spencer Watts
programme.desc: Spencer is inspired by all the fun different flavours you can bring to food with peppers. He makes salty prosciutto and Calabrian chili stuffed salmon pinwheels on skewers, coated with a pickled pepper butter. Then he fire roasts some bell peppers for his flavour packed harrisa butter basted grilled half chickens. Duck breasts gets a peppery pastrami rub and is served with charred stone fruit, berries and arugula. And garden fresh shishito peppers get a fast and furious char and a broken Caesar dressing.

programme.title: Fun'Q with Spencer Watts
programme.desc: Big platters of food, lots of smiling faces, sharing and laughter - who doesn't love a great grilled feast? Spencer makes his root beer pulled pork complete with pickled peppers and a mustard barbecue sauce. Then it's all about the steak. He grills up a Santa Maria tri-tip with loaded corn on the cob dipping in a lime infused sauce and rolled in parmesan cheese and bacon. Then he shares his tips for the perfect grilled Ribeye served with a fresh horseradish mayo and ranch flavoured hickory sticks. And to round out the carnivorous platters, he finishes things off with some grilled baby potatoes coated in sharp raclette cheese and topped with a caper gherkin relish. It's time to get this party started!

programme.title: Fun'Q with Spencer Watts
programme.desc: Fire and meat has been done since the caveman era - but vegetarian dishes - that's where things can get really creative. Spencer starts with decadent cheese and garlic laden zucchini boats stuffed and charred to perfection. Then Spencer celebrates holy smokin' eggplants with his smoked Babaganoush served with charred veg and homemade dukkah spice. If you love rice, then get it on the grill! Grilled Yaki Onigiri (rice cakes) drizzled with chili brown butter and funky togarashi spice topping is delicious. And, last, but not least, it's soup on the barbecue. What? Yes! Charred corn and tortillas makes one of the best soups of the summer.

programme.title: Fun'Q with Spencer Watts
programme.desc: Spencer celebrates his favourite vacation spot with a Hawaiian themed barbecued feast starting with grilled mahi mahi kababs and a charred pineapple sauce. Then he uses banana leaves to bundle some buttery white fish with sticky rice and juicy grilled pork belly. Long, bone in in pork chops get a smokey tiki tiki spice rub and are served up with some Kona coffee glazed onions and a summer fruit salsa. And, everyone loves some flambéed tropical fruit in a light caramel rum sauce, poured from mounds of ice cream.

programme.title: One World Kitchen
programme.desc: Why order delicate fried zucchini flowers at a posh restaurant when we can make them so easily in our own kitchen? Italian chef Vanessa Gianfrancesco shows us how to prepare these beautiful orange blossoms that bloom briefly in the summer.

programme.title: One World Kitchen
programme.desc: You can easily buy a little jar of red curry paste at most grocery stores, but Thai cookbook author and chef Pailin Chongchitnant will show you how to make it at home from scratch.

programme.title: One World Kitchen
programme.sub-title: Japanese Food Inspired by Other Cultures
programme.desc: Imitation is the sincerest form of flattery, they say, and Japanese-German chef Hana Etsuko Dethlefsen shows us some Japanese cuisine that was inspired by other cultures.

programme.title: One Big Recipe
programme.desc: First up White Bean Hummus, served with pita, topped with savoury Caramelized Onion Jam and fried sage. Next, Grilled Treviso Salad with arugula pesto, red grapes, and pine nuts followed by Brussels Sprouts topped with crunchy brown butter cashews and Salt Crusted Potato with Chive Oil finish. And finally, Pasta Giardina tossed with ribbons of garden veggies with fresh peas, mint, and a crumble of ricotta salata cheese.

programme.title: Travels with Darley
programme.desc: Darley shares history, food, and art in and around Santa Fe, New Mexico. Learn about Georgia O'Keeffe's life at Ghost Ranch from a cowboy who grew up with her. Explore art along Canyon Road and at Origami in the Garden along the Turquoise Trail National Scenic Byway.

programme.title: Travels with Darley
programme.desc: Darley Newman shares how to get the most out of your visit to France's renowned wine region, including archaeological marvels, historic landmarks, cultural treasures—and multiple wine tastings. She explores Bordeaux on a river cruise, taking excursions via retro sidecar and to survey wine and cuisine from across the region.

programme.title: Travels with Darley
programme.desc: World-class wine, medieval villages, museums and markets, the Bordeaux region of France is truly a feast for the senses. Darley cruises rivers and explore villages to reveal history around every scenic turn. Discover the quaint wine hills of Saint-Émilion along the pilgrimage route to Santiago de Compostela and the history of winemaking at La Cité du Vin.

programme.title: Travels with Darley
programme.desc: From Delaware's first settler to the du Pont mansions and a historic fort, Darley discovers American history in and around Wilmington. She shares where to get great local beer and dine at a James Beard Award-nominated restaurant. Join her in exploring the charming colonial town of New Castle and opulence at Nemours Estate, Winterthur and Hagley Museum & Library.

programme.title: One Ocean
programme.desc: In The Birth of an Ocean we travel back to ancient time, telling the story of the ocean's turbulent beginnings, and its successive incarnations. It's a journey that introduces the enormity of the ocean over space and time – at four billion years old the ocean is nearly as old as the planet itself.

programme.title: One Ocean
programme.desc: In our second episode, Footprints in the Sand, we take measure of humanity's impact on the sea since we first settled along its coasts over 150,000 years ago. We travel to the Mediterranean Sea with local Spanish fishermen in search of the magnificent bluefin tuna, the most prized fish in the ocean. It's also one of the most overfished. As fishermen try to maintain their centuries-old method of fishing, conservation scientists are desperate to find hard evidence to support their side in the heated debate over quotas.

programme.title: One Ocean
programme.desc: Episode Three of our series reveals the Mysteries of the Deep and takes us to the most beguiling parts of the sea, the very depths that we know so little about. As we improve our technological prowess, we are venturing deeper and deeper into the planet's last frontier. What scientists are discovering is beyond our wildest imaginings.

programme.title: One Ocean
programme.desc: In our final episode, The Changing Sea, we discover that the ocean is sending us clear signals. Off the rugged and beautiful coast of British Columbia we meet scientists and fishermen who are shocked at the recent arrival of a voracious new creature – the Humboldt squid. This monster-sized squid native to the equatorial waters of Mexico has moved north and ushered in a cascade of changes to the ecosystem. Their arrival is part of a disturbing pattern that is emerging with species movement being tracked around the world.

programme.sub-title: Heli Platform to Platform Jump, Barber Shop, Container Launch
programme.desc: This episode features four co-ed pairs competing as teams. In the first stunt, both team members leap back and forth between two platforms hanging from helicopters with each person transferring up to 10 flags from one platform to the other and then jumping in the water. The three teams to get highest flag total will advance to the next round. In the second stunt one team member is seated in a barber chair and their partner spins them. When the chair stops, they have to get whichever haircut their head was pointing to. There are six haircuts they can get. Teams would advance to the finals if both members got their designated haircuts. In the finale a crane lifts a large container to 200 feet in the air, both team members have to climb rope ladders hanging from the container. Once they reach the container, they both have to scale a narrow ledge on the side, collect two Allen wrenches, and climb another ladder to the top. Once on top, they have to use the wrenches to unscrew hatches and climb down into the container. When they were both inside, they have to touch two pieces of a live wire together in order to blow themselves out of the container and into the water below. The team to complete this stunt the fastest would be the Fear Factor Champions at winning $50,000. This week competing in the Home Invasion is the Frederickson family of Hagerstown, Maryland.

programme.title: Storm Hunters | Heartache & Hope
programme.desc: It's an ordinary town with a history of heartache. No one knows why Moore, Oklahoma has been the target of 3 mega-tornadoes in just 16 years. On the heels of the May 20, 2013 EF5 tornado, Mark & Jaclyn uncover stories behind the disaster, the recovery, and the tenacious spirit of the people of the US Midwest.

programme.title: Storm Hunters | Into the Core
programme.desc: One year after witnessing a record number of deadly twisters in Tornado Alley, Mark & Jaclyn return to the Midwest in search of more extreme storms. The hunt challenges their relationship with Mother Nature, as well as with each other.

programme.title: Captured
programme.desc: Volcanic ash engulfing a town, a massive firenado in California - just some of the viral weather videos caught on camera in this episode of Captured, as Vicious Winds take center stage.

programme.title: Captured
programme.desc: In these viral videos we witness how, in the blink of an eye, your day can become suddenly dangerous. Even on a beautiful day, when you're not expecting any severe weather at all, Mother Nature can sometimes be malicious and sneaky

programme.title: Captured
programme.desc: Humans are inclined to take the natural element of water for granted until they witness its relentless power and destructive capabilities.

programme.title: Captured

programme.title: Larger-Than-Life Art
programme.desc: Artists who translate imagination and poignant worldviews into monumental, magnificent pieces of art. 1) A video game to cope with grief | Amy Green 2) How hip-hop helps us understand science | Danielle N. Lee 3) Everything you need to know to read "The Canterbury Tales" - Iseult Gillespie 4) The symbols of systemic racism -- and how to take away their power | Paul Rucker 5) Why people of different faiths are painting their houses of worship yellow | Nabila Alibhai 6) The Herds, a vast act of theater to spark climate action | Amir Nizar Zuabi

programme.title: Art and Science of Love
programme.desc: A crash course on what it means to love -- and love well. 1) What young women believe about their own sexual pleasure | Peggy Orenstein 2) How couples can sustain a strong sexual connection for a lifetime | Emily Nagoski 3) Technology hasn't changed love. Here's why | Helen Fisher 4) The myth of the moon goddess | Cynthia Fay Davis

programme.title: Tales from the Edge
programme.desc: Ski to the North Pole. Row across the Pacific. Swim on Mt. Everest. Adventurers and brave souls who have pushed themselves to the limits of human endurance, and share what they've learned. 1) How we unearthed the Spinosaurus | Nizar Ibrahim 2) Help discover ancient ruins -- before it's too late | Sarah Parcak 3) Why did Megalodon go extinct? | Jack Cooper and Catalina Pimiento 4) Why did I ski to the North Pole? | Ben Saunders

programme.title: Good Talk
programme.desc: The art and science of meaningful conversation. 1) How miscommunication happens (and how to avoid it) - Katherine Hampsten 2) How to foster productive and responsible debate | Ishan Bhabha 3) How do you know whom to trust? | Ram Neta 4) Can beauty open our hearts to difficult conversations? | Titus Kaphar 5) What happened when we paired up thousands of strangers to talk politics | Jochen Wegner 6) How to use rhetoric to get what you want | Camille Langston 7) How do our brains process speech? | Gareth Gaskell

programme.title: The Art of Being Human
programme.desc: Beautiful, intimate and ultimately uplifting stories of challenge and humanity -- from making a new home in a strange country, to rebuilding life after unthinkable tragedy. (1) Less stuff, more happiness | Graham Hill (2) We don't "move on" from grief. We move forward with it | Nora McInerny (3) The secret student resistance to Hitler - Iseult Gillespie (4) The beauty of being a misfit | Lidia Yuknavitch (5) Say your truths and seek them in others | Elizabeth Lesser

programme.title: The Connection
programme.desc: An exploration and meditation on how to nurture, sustain and improve all kinds of relationships in your life. 1) A mother and son united by love and art | Deb Willis and Hank Willis Thomas 2) How adoption worked for me | Christopher Ategeka 3) My story of love and loss as a transracial adoptee | Sara Jones 4) Three Months After | Cristin O'Keefe Aptowicz 5) The mood-boosting power of crying | Kathy Mendias 6) The profound power of an authentic apology | Eve Ensler

programme.title: The Poetry Corner
programme.desc: Sit back, relax and let the rhythm of poetry ask questions and deliver truths about what it means to be human. 1) Poems of war, peace, women, power | Suheir Hammad 2) A lyrical bridge between past, present and future | David Whyte 3) Metaphorically speaking | James Geary 4) Why should you read Dante's "Divine Comedy"? | Sheila Marie Orfano 5) Can a computer write poetry? | Oscar Schwartz
